'bg-transparent' : 'bg-slate-950', \n    text: 'text-slate-100', \n    panel: 'bg-slate-900', \n    border: 'border-slate-800'\n  } : {\n    bg: hasBgImage ? 'bg-transparent' : 'bg-white', \n    text: 'text-slate-900', \n    panel: 'bg-slate-50', \n    border: 'border-slate-200'\n  };\n\n  const overlayStyle = hasBgImage ? {\n      backgroundColor: isDarkMode ? `rgba(2, 6, 23, ${bgOverlayOpacity})` : `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${bgOverlayOpacity})`,\n      backdropFilter: 'blur(3px)'\n  } : {};\n\n  if (!currentProblem) return null;\n\n  const formatTime = (seconds: number) => {\n    const m = Math.floor(seconds / 60);\n    const s = seconds % 60;\n    return `${m}:${s < 10 ? '0' : ''}${s}`;\n  };\n\n  const renderContent = () => {\n    if (currentProblem.techniqueUsed === 'CORE_KNOWLEDGE') {\n       return (\n         <div className=\"flex flex-col h-full animate-fadeIn w-full relative z-10\">\n            <div className=\"h-[12.5%] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center px-6 border-b border-indigo-500/30 bg-indigo-600/10 shadow-lg relative z-10 backdrop-blur-sm\">\n                <div className=\"absolute left-6 flex items-center gap-2 opacity-50\">\n                    <BookOpen size={20} className=\"text-indigo-400\" />\n                    <span className=\"text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest text-indigo-400\">Core Knowledge</span>\n                </div>\n                <h1 className={`font-black tracking-tight leading-tight ${isDarkMode ? 'text-white' : 'text-slate-900'}`} style={{ fontSize: `${(fontSizeScale / 100) * 2.5}rem` }}>\n                    {currentProblem.title}\n                </h1>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto w-full px-6 py-12 custom-scrollbar\">\n                <div className=\"w-full space-y-10\">\n                    {coreItems.length > 0 ? coreItems.map((item, i) => (\n                        <div \n                            key={i} \n                            className={`flex gap-10 items-start transition-all duration-1000 transform border-l-[12px] border-indigo-600/10 pl-12 py-8 bg-white/2 rounded-r-[2rem] shadow-sm ${i < visibleItemsCount ? 'opacity-100 translate-x-0 border-indigo-600 bg-indigo-600/5' : 'opacity-0 translate-y-16 pointer-events-none'}`}\n                        >\n                            <div className=\"w-20 h-20 bg-indigo-600 text-white rounded-[1.5rem] flex items-center justify-center font-black text-4xl shrink-0 shadow-2xl shadow-indigo-500/40\">\n                                {i + 1}\n                            </div>\n                            <div className={`${theme.text} font-bold leading-relaxed text-left flex-1 py-2`} style={{ fontSize: `${(fontSizeScale / 100) * 1.8}rem` }}>\n                                <MathRenderer content={item} isHighlighted={isDarkMode} />\n                            </div>\n                        </div>\n                    )) : (\n                        <p className=\"text-center text-slate-500 italic\">Không có nội dung kiến thức.</p>\n                    )}\n                </div>\n\n                {visibleItemsCount < coreItems.length && (\n                    <div className=\"mt-16 pb-10 flex justify-center animate-pulse\">\n                        <div className=\"px-10 py-4 bg-indigo-600/30 text-indigo-300 rounded-full border-2 border-indigo-500/50 text-sm font-black uppercase tracking-[0.3em] shadow-xl\">\n                            Click màn hình hoặc Space để hiện tiếp\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n            </div>\n         </div>\n       );\n    }\n    return (\n        <div className=\"pro-frame shadow-2xl animate-fadeIn h-full flex flex-col relative max-w-full z-10\" style={overlayStyle}>\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-2 border-b border-white/5 pb-1\">\n                <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n                    <span className=\"w-1 h-4 bg-indigo-600 rounded-full\"></span>\n                    <span className=\"text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-indigo-400\">Nội dung bài học</span>\n                </div>\n                <DifficultyBadge level={currentProblem.difficulty} />\n            </div>\n            \n            <div className={`${theme.text} leading-relaxed text-left font-bold flex-grow overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar pr-2 whitespace-pre-line`} style={{ fontSize: `${(fontSizeScale / 100) * 1.5}rem` }}>\n                <MathRenderer content={showSolution ? currentProblem.presentation.questionSummary : currentProblem.content} isHighlighted={isDarkMode} />\n            </div>\n            \n            {!showSolution && (\n                <div className=\"mt-2 shrink-0 flex gap-2\">\n                    <button onClick={() => setShowSolution(true)} className=\"group flex items-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600/80 text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-all font-black text-[11px]\">\n                        <Lightbulb className=\"text-yellow-300 group-hover:rotate-12 transition-transform\" size={14} /> LỜI GIẢI (S)\n                    </button>\n                    <div className=\"relative\">\n                        <button onClick={() => handleSpeak()} disabled={isLoadingTTS} className={`group flex items-center gap-2 ${isReading ? 'bg-red-500' : 'bg-slate-700'} text-white px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:opacity-90 transition-all font-black text-[11px]`}>\n                            {isLoadingTTS ? <Loader2 size={14} className=\"animate-spin\" /> : (isReading ? <VolumeX size={14} /> : <Volume2 size={14} />)} \n                            {isReading ? 'DỪNG ĐỌC' : 'ĐỌC ĐỀ (V)'}\n                        </button>\n                        {ttsError && (\n                            <div className=\"absolute bottom-full left-0 mb-2 w-64 bg-red-900/90 text-white text-[10px] p-2 rounded-lg border border-red-500 shadow-xl flex items-center gap-2 animate-fadeIn z-[200]\">\n                                <AlertCircle size={12} className=\"shrink-0\" />\n                                <span>{ttsError}</span>\n                            </div>\n                        )}\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            )}\n        </div>\n    );\n  };\n\n  const effectiveWebBoardWidth = showWebBoard ? (isWebBoardCollapsed ? 24 : webBoardWidth) : 0;\n\n  return (\n    <div className={`fixed inset-0 z-[100] ${theme.bg} flex flex-col transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden font-['Roboto'] font-bold`}>\n      \n      {/* Background Image Layer */}\n      {selectedBgIndex !== null && bgImages[selectedBgIndex] && (\n          <img \n            src={bgImages[selectedBgIndex]} \n            alt=\"Presentation Background\" \n            className=\"absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover z-0 transition-opacity duration-500\"\n          />\n      )}\n\n      {/* Overlay Layer for readability if background exists (handled in renderContent or global here) */}\n      {hasBgImage && <div className=\"absolute inset-0 z-0 pointer-events-none transition-colors duration-300\" style={{ backgroundColor: isDarkMode ? `rgba(0,0,0,${Math.max(0, bgOverlayOpacity - 0.2)})` : `rgba(255,255,255,${Math.max(0, bgOverlayOpacity - 0.2)})` }} />}\n\n      {/* TOP BAR - AUTO HIDE */}\n      <div className={`h-10 flex items-center justify-between px-4 border-b ${theme.border} backdrop-blur-md z-[110] shadow-sm relative transition-transform duration-300 ${showControls ? 'translate-y-0' : '-translate-y-full'}`}>\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <div className=\"bg-indigo-600 text-white font-black px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[8px] uppercase tracking-widest\">STUDIO</div>\n            <h2 className={`${theme.text} font-bold text-[11px] hidden lg:block truncate max-w-[200px]`}>{currentProblem.title}</h2>\n          </div>\n          \n          <div className=\"relative flex items-center gap-0.5 bg-slate-900/50 p-0.5 rounded-md scale-90\">\n             <button \n                onClick={() => setShowZoomMenu(!showZoomMenu)}\n                className=\"text-slate-400 px-2 hover:text-white flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] font-mono\"\n             >\n                <Type size={12}/> {fontSizeScale / 100}x <ChevronLeft size={10} className=\"rotate-90\"/>\n             </button>\n             {showZoomMenu && (\n                 <div className=\"absolute top-8 left-0 bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg shadow-2xl p-1 z-[130] flex flex-col gap-0.5 min-w-[60px]\">\n                     {ZOOM_LEVELS.map((level) => (\n                         <button \n                            key={level.value}\n                            onClick={() => { setFontSizeScale(level.value); setShowZoomMenu(false); }}\n                            className={`px-3 py-1.5 rounded text-[10px] font-bold text-left hover:bg-indigo-600 hover:text-white ${fontSizeScale === level.value ? 'bg-indigo-600 text-white' : 'text-slate-300'}`}\n                         >\n                             {level.label}\n                         </button>\n                     ))}\n                 </div>\n             )}\n          </div>\n          \n          <div className=\"flex gap-1 ml-2 scale-75\">\n              {MATH_COLORS.map((c) => (\n                <button key={c.color} onClick={() => setMathColor(c.color)} className={`w-3.5 h-3.5 rounded-full border border-white/20 transition-all ${mathColor === c.color ? 'ring-2 ring-white scale-110 shadow-lg' : 'hover:scale-105'}`} style={{ backgroundColor: c.color }} />\n              ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n          \n           {/* Edit Button */}\n           <button \n             onClick={openEditModal}\n             className={`p-1.5 rounded-lg scale-90 transition-all bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white`}\n             title=\"Chỉnh sửa bài này\"\n           >\n             <Edit size={16} />\n           </button>\n\n           {/* Background Menu */}\n           <div className=\"relative\">\n              <button \n                onClick={() => { setShowBgMenu(!showBgMenu); setShowTimerMenu(false); setShowLuckyMenu(false); }}\n                className={`p-1.5 rounded-lg scale-90 transition-all ${hasBgImage ? 'bg-indigo-600 text-white' : 'bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white'}`}\n                title=\"Chọn hình nền\"\n              >\n                <ImageIcon size={16} />\n              </button>\n              {showBgMenu && (\n                <div className=\"absolute top-10 right-0 bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded-xl shadow-2xl p-4 z-[130] w-64 animate-fadeIn\">\n                    <h3 className=\"text-[10px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest mb-3\">Thư viện hình nền</h3>\n                    <div className=\"grid grid-cols-3 gap-2 mb-4\">\n                        <button \n                            onClick={() => setSelectedBgIndex(null)}\n                            className={`aspect-video rounded border-2 flex items-center justify-center text-xs text-slate-500 bg-slate-800 hover:text-white transition-all ${selectedBgIndex === null ? 'border-indigo-500' : 'border-transparent'}`}\n                        >\n                            None\n                        </button>\n                        {bgImages.map((img, idx) => (\n                            <button \n                                key={idx}\n                                onClick={() => setSelectedBgIndex(idx)}\n                                className={`aspect-video rounded border-2 overflow-hidden relative group ${selectedBgIndex === idx ? 'border-indigo-500' : 'border-transparent'}`}\n                            >\n                                <img src={img} className=\"w-full h-full object-cover\" alt=\"bg thumb\" />\n                            </button>\n                        ))}\n                         <button \n                            onClick={() => bgInputRef.current?.click()}\n                            className=\"aspect-video rounded border-2 border-dashed border-slate-600 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-slate-500 hover:text-indigo-400 hover:border-indigo-400 transition-all\"\n                        >\n                            <Upload size={14} />\n                            <span className=\"text-[8px] mt-1 font-bold\">Upload</span>\n                        </button>\n                        <input type=\"file\" ref={bgInputRef} className=\"hidden\" accept=\"image/*\" onChange={handleBgUpload} />\n                    </div>\n                    \n                    {hasBgImage && (\n                        <div className=\"space-y-2 pt-2 border-t border-slate-700\">\n                             <div className=\"flex justify-between text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-400\">\n                                <span>Độ mờ khung nội dung</span>\n                                <span>{Math.round(bgOverlayOpacity * 100)}%</span>\n                             </div>\n                             <input \n                                type=\"range\" \n                                min=\"0\" \n                                max=\"1\" \n                                step=\"0.1\" \n                                value={bgOverlayOpacity} \n                                onChange={(e) => setBgOverlayOpacity(parseFloat(e.target.value))}\n                                className=\"w-full h-1 bg-slate-700 rounded-full appearance-none accent-indigo-500\"\n                             />\n                        </div>\n                    )}\n                </div>\n              )}\n           </div>\n\n          <button \n            onClick={toggleAppFullScreen}\n            className={`p-1.5 rounded-lg scale-90 transition-all ${isAppFullScreen ? 'bg-indigo-600 text-white' : 'bg-slate-800 text-slate-400 hover:text-white'}`}\n            title=\"Toàn màn hình (M)\"\n          >\n            <Monitor size={16} />\n          </button>\n\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 bg-slate-900 rounded-lg border border-slate-800 scale-90\">\n            <div className=\"relative\">\n              <button \n                onClick={() => { setShowTimerMenu(!showTimerMenu); setShowLuckyMenu(false); setShowBgMenu(false); }} \n                className={`p-1 rounded-md transition-all ${isTimerActive ? 'text-indigo-400 animate-pulse' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-white'}`}\n                title=\"Đồng hồ (1-5)\"\n              >\n                <Timer size={14} />\n              </button>\n              {showTimerMenu && (\n                <div className=\"absolute top-8 left-0 bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg shadow-2xl p-1 z-[130] flex flex-col gap-0.5 min-w-[100px]\">\n                  {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map(m => (\n                    <button key={m} onClick={() => startTimer(m)} className=\"px-3 py-1.5 hover:bg-indigo-600 text-white rounded text-[10px] font-bold text-left flex justify-between\">\n                      <span>{m}p</span>\n                    </button>\n                  ))}\n                </div>\n              )}\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5 border-l border-slate-700 pl-1.5 relative\">\n               <button \n                onClick={() => { setShowLuckyMenu(!showLuckyMenu); setShowTimerMenu(false); setShowBgMenu(false); }} \n                disabled={isSpinning} \n                className={`p-1 transition-colors ${isSpinning ? 'text-indigo-500 animate-spin' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-indigo-400'}`} \n                title=\"Vòng quay may mắn (R)\"\n               >\n                 <Dices size={14}/>\n               </button>\n               {showLuckyMenu && (\n                <div className=\"absolute top-8 left-0 bg-slate-800 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg shadow-2xl p-2 z-[130] flex flex-col gap-2 min-w-[140px]\">\n                  <div className=\"flex flex-col gap-1\">\n                    <span className=\"text-[8px] font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest\">Sĩ số lớp</span>\n                    <div className=\"flex gap-1\">\n                      <input \n                        type=\"number\" \n                        value={maxStudent} \n                        onChange={(e) => setMaxStudent(Math.max(1, parseInt(e.target.value) || 1))}\n                        className=\"bg-slate-900 border border-slate-700 rounded px-2 py-1 text-[10px] font-bold text-white w-full outline-none focus:border-indigo-500\"\n                        placeholder=\"Số HS\"\n                      />\n                      <button \n                        onClick={generateRandom} \n                        className=\"bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white p-1 rounded transition-colors\"\n                      >\n                        <Play size={10} />\n                      </button>\n                    </div>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n               )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1 bg-slate-900 p-0.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-800 scale-90\">\n             <button onClick={() => setIsDarkMode(true)} className={`p-1 rounded-md ${isDarkMode ? 'bg-indigo-600 text-white' : 'text-slate-500'}`}><Moon size={12}/></button>\n             <button onClick={() => setIsDarkMode(false)} className={`p-1 rounded-md ${!isDarkMode ? 'bg-white text-indigo-600' : 'text-slate-500'}`}><Sun size={12}/></button>\n          </div>\n          \n          <button \n            onClick={() => setShowWebBoard(!showWebBoard)} \n            className={`p-1.5 rounded-lg scale-90 transition-all ${showWebBoard ? 'bg-amber-500 text-white' : 'bg-slate-800 text-slate-400'}`}\n            title=\"Mở Web Studio (W)\"\n          >\n            <Globe size={16} />\n          </button>\n\n          <button onClick={handleExportWord} className=\"p-1.5 bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded-lg scale-90 hover:bg-emerald-700 flex items-center gap-1 px-2\" title=\"Xuất Word đầy đủ\">\n            <FileText size={14} /> <span className=\"text-[10px] font-bold\">XUẤT WORD</span>\n          </button>\n\n          <button onClick={onClose} className=\"p-1.5 bg-red-500 text-white rounded-lg scale-90 hover:bg-red-600\"><X size={14} /></button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <div \n        className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden relative z-10\"\n        onClick={handleContentClick}\n        style={{ marginRight: effectiveWebBoardWidth, transition: 'margin-right 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)' }}\n      >\n        {/* Main Content (Problem) Panel */}\n        <div \n            className={`h-full overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out p-1 md:p-2 bg-transparent relative`}\n            style={{ \n                width: showSolution && !isSolutionFullScreen ? `calc(100% - ${solutionWidth}px)` : (showSolution && isSolutionFullScreen ? 0 : '100%'),\n                opacity: showSolution && isSolutionFullScreen ? 0 : 1,\n                pointerEvents: showSolution && isSolutionFullScreen ? 'none' : 'auto'\n            }}\n        >\n          {renderContent()}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Solution Panel */}\n        <div \n            className={`h-full fixed top-10 bottom-12 right-0 transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out z-[50] ${theme.panel} ${showSolution ? 'translate-x-0' : 'translate-x-full'}`}\n            style={{ \n                width: isSolutionFullScreen ? '100%' : `${solutionWidth}px`,\n                marginRight: effectiveWebBoardWidth,\n                borderLeft: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)',\n                boxShadow: '-10px 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)',\n                ...(hasBgImage ? { backgroundColor: isDarkMode ? `rgba(2, 6, 23, ${bgOverlayOpacity})` : `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${bgOverlayOpacity})`, backdropFilter: 'blur(10px)' } : {})\n            }}\n        >\n          {showSolution && (\n            <div className=\"relative h-full flex flex-col\">\n              {/* Resize Handle for Solution Panel */}\n              {!isSolutionFullScreen && (\n                  <div \n                    onMouseDown={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); setIsDraggingSolution(true); }}\n                    className={`absolute left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-4 cursor-col-resize z-[60] flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-indigo-500/30 transition-colors ${isDraggingSolution ? 'bg-indigo-500/50' : ''}`}\n                    title=\"Kéo để thay đổi độ rộng\"\n                  >\n                      <GripVertical size={16} className=\"text-white/20\" />\n                  </div>\n              )}\n\n              <div className=\"animate-slideUp pro-frame h-full max-w-full flex flex-col p-1 md:p-2\" onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>\n                <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-2 border-b border-white/5 pb-1 shrink-0 pl-4\">\n                  <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-emerald-400\">\n                    < GraduationCap size={16}/>\n                    <span className=\"text-[9px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em]\">Hướng dẫn giải</span>\n                  </div>\n                  <button \n                    onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setIsSolutionFullScreen(!isSolutionFullScreen); }}\n                    className=\"p-1 rounded hover:bg-white/10 text-slate-400 transition-colors\"\n                    title={isSolutionFullScreen ? \"Thu nhỏ (F)\" : \"Phóng to toàn màn hình (F)\"}\n                  >\n                    {isSolutionFullScreen ? <Minimize2 size={14} /> : <Maximize2 size={14} />}\n                  </button>\n                </div>\n                \n                {/* Solution Content Area - Full View */}\n                <div \n                    className={`${theme.text} leading-loose text-left font-bold overflow-y-auto flex-1 custom-scrollbar pr-2 pl-2 whitespace-pre-line`} \n                    style={{ fontSize: `${(fontSizeScale / 100) * 1.3}rem` }}\n                >\n                   <MathRenderer content={currentProblem.presentation.solutionSummary} isHighlighted={isDarkMode} />\n                </div>\n                \n                <div className=\"mt-4 pt-2 border-t border-white/10 shrink-0 pl-2 pb-20\">\n                  <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleToggleResult(); }} className={`flex items-center gap-1 font-black uppercase text-[8px] tracking-[0.1em] mb-2 transition-colors ${showResult ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-slate-500 hover:text-indigo-400'}`}>\n                    <CheckCircle size={12}/> {showResult ? \"Kết quả\" : \"Hiện kết quả (A)\"}\n                  </button>\n                  {showResult && (\n                    <div className=\"p-2 rounded-xl border border-dashed border-emerald-500/30 animate-slideUp bg-emerald-500/5 max-w-full overflow-hidden\">\n                      <div className=\"text-emerald-400 font-bold text-center\" style={{ fontSize: `${(fontSizeScale / 100) * 1.8}rem` }}>\n                        <MathRenderer content={formatMath(currentProblem.presentation.finalResult)} />\n                      </div>\n                    </div>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"absolute bottom-10 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 z-[150] flex flex-col items-center pointer-events-none\">\n           {randomResult !== null && (\n             <div className={`mb-4 px-10 py-5 bg-indigo-600/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-2 border-white/30 rounded-3xl shadow-2xl transition-all duration-300 ${isSpinning ? 'scale-105 blur-[1px]' : 'scale-110 animate-bounce'}`}>\n                <div className=\"text-center\">\n                   <p className=\"text-white/70 text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[0.2em] mb-1\">{isSpinning ? \"Đang chọn...\" : \"Số may mắn\"}</p>\n                   <p className={`text-white text-6xl font-black tabular-nums ${isSpinning ? 'opacity-50' : 'opacity-100'}`}>{randomResult}</p>\n                </div>\n             </div>\n           )}\n\n           {timeLeft !== null && (\n             <div className={`px-6 py-2 bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-2xl shadow-xl flex items-center gap-4 transition-all scale-90 ${timeLeft < 30 ? 'border-red-500/50' : ''}`}>\n                <Timer size={20} className={timeLeft < 30 ? 'text-red-500 animate-pulse' : 'text-indigo-400'} />\n                <div className={`text-3xl font-mono font-black tabular-nums ${timeLeft < 30 ? 'text-red-500' : 'text-white'}`}>\n                   {formatTime(timeLeft)}\n                </div>\n             </div>\n           )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* BOTTOM BAR - AUTO HIDE */}\n      <div className={`h-12 border-t ${theme.border} flex items-center justify-between px-6 z-[110] bg-slate-950/90 shadow-lg transition-transform duration-300 ${showControls ? 'translate-y-0' : 'translate-y-full'}`}>\n        <button onClick={handlePrev} disabled={currentIndex === 0} className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-4 py-1.5 rounded-lg font-black text-[9px] tracking-[0.1em] transition-all ${currentIndex === 0 ? 'opacity-10' : 'text-slate-300 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5'}`}><ChevronLeft size={16} /> TRƯỚC</button>\n        <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center\">\n            <div className=\"bg-indigo-600 text-white px-5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[9px] font-black tracking-[0.2em] shadow-md\">{currentIndex + 1} / {problems.length}</div>\n            <div className=\"mt-1 flex gap-1\">\n                {problems.map((_, i) => (<div key={i} className={`h-1 rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ${i === currentIndex ? MouseEvent) => {\n      const { clientY } = e;\n      const windowHeight = window.innerHeight;\n      \n      // Show Header if mouse is near top (e.g., < 100px)\n      if (clientY < 100) {\n        setIsHeaderVisible(true);\n      } else {\n        setIsHeaderVisible(false);\n      }\n\n      // Show Footer if mouse is near bottom (e.g., > windowHeight - 100)\n      if (clientY > windowHeight - 100) {\n        setIsFooterVisible(true);\n      } else {\n        setIsFooterVisible(false);\n      }\n    };\n\n    window.addEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('mousemove', handleMouseMove);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    // Show Intro for 3 seconds\n    const timer = setTimeout(() => {\n      setShowIntro(false);\n    }, 3000);\n    return () => clearTimeout(timer);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (view === 'BANK') setBankItems(getBankItems());\n  }, [view]);\n\n  const uniqueTopics = useMemo(() => {\n    const topics = new Set(bankItems.map(item => item.topic));\n    return Array.from(topics).filter(Boolean).sort();\n  }, [bankItems]);\n\n  const uniqueGrades = useMemo(() => {\n    const grades = new Set(bankItems.map(item => item.grade));\n    return Array.from(grades).filter(Boolean).sort();\n  }, [bankItems]);\n\n  const filteredBankItems = useMemo(() => {\n    return bankItems.filter(item => {\n      const matchesSearch = item.originalContent.toLowerCase().includes(bankSearch.toLowerCase()) || \n                           item.topic.toLowerCase().includes(bankSearch.toLowerCase());\n      const matchesTopic = filterTopic === 'ALL' || item.topic === filterTopic;\n      const matchesGrade = filterGrade === 'ALL' || item.grade === filterGrade;\n      return matchesSearch && matchesTopic && matchesGrade;\n    }).sort((a, b) => b.savedAt - a.savedAt);\n  }, [bankItems, bankSearch, filterTopic, filterGrade]);\n\n  const handleFileChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {\n    const file = e.target.files?.[0];\n    if (!file) return;\n    const reader = new FileReader();\n    reader.onloadend = () => {\n      const base64 = (reader.result as string).split(',')[1];\n      setInputFile({ data: base64, mimeType: file.type || 'application/octet-stream', name: file.name });\n    };\n    reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n  };\n\n  const handlePresentationFileLoad = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {\n    const file = e.target.files?.[0];\n    if (!file) return;\n    const reader = new FileReader();\n    reader.onload = (event) => {\n      try {\n        const data = JSON.parse(event.target?.result as string);\n        if (Array.isArray(data)) {\n          if (data.length > 0 && (data[0].presentation || data[0].content)) {\n            setPresentationProblems(data);\n            setPresentationMode(true);\n          } else {\n            alert(\"Định dạng file không phù hợp để trình chiếu.\");\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        alert(\"Lỗi khi đọc file JSON.\");\n      }\n    };\n    reader.readAsText(file);\n    e.target.value = '';\n  };\n\n  const mapSelectedAnalysis = (): GeneratedProblem[] => {\n    return analysisList\n      .filter((_, i) => selectedAnalysisIdxs.has(i))\n      .map((item, idx) => ({\n        id: crypto.randomUUID(),\n        title: `Bài Gốc ${idx + 1}`,\n        content: item.originalContent,\n        difficulty: item.difficulty,\n        techniqueUsed: item.coreTechnique,\n        solution: item.suggestedSolution || \"N/A\",\n        teacherNotes: item.coreIdea,\n        presentation: {\n          questionSummary: item.originalContent,\n          solutionSummary: item.suggestedSolution || \"N/A\",\n          finalResult: \"N/A\"\n        }\n      }));\n  };\n\n  const handleExportBank = () => {\n    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(bankItems, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });\n    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n    const link = document.createElement('a');\n    link.href = url;\n    link.download = `Olympic_Math_Bank_${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}.json`;\n    link.click();\n    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n  };\n\n  const handleExportResultsJSON = (data: GeneratedProblem[], label: string) => {\n    if (data.length === 0) return;\n    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(data, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });\n    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n    const link = document.createElement('a');\n    link.href = url;\n    link.download = `Olympic_Math_${label}_${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}.json`;\n    link.click();\n    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n  };\n\n  const handleImportBank = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {\n    const file = e.target.files?.[0];\n    if (!file) return;\n    const reader = new FileReader();\n    reader.onload = (event) => {\n      try {\n        const data = JSON.parse(event.target?.result as string);\n        const count = importToBank(data);\n        alert(`Đã nhập thành công ${count} mục vào ngân hàng.`);\n        setBankItems(getBankItems());\n      } catch (err) {\n        alert(\"Lỗi khi nhập file JSON. Vui lòng kiểm tra định dạng.\");\n      }\n    };\n    reader.readAsText(file);\n    e.target.value = '';\n  };\n\n  const startAnalysis = async () => {\n    if (!problemText && !inputFile) { alert(\"Vui lòng nhập văn bản hoặc tải lên tệp tin.\"); return; }\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const result = await analyzeMathProblem(problemText, inputFile || undefined);\n      setAnalysisList(result);\n      setSelectedAnalysisIdxs(new Set(result.map((_, i) => i)));\n      setStep('ANALYSIS');\n    } catch (err) { \n        console.error(err);\n        alert(err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Phân tích thất bại.\"); \n    } finally { setLoading(false); }\n  };\n\n  const handleCreateWorksheet = async () => {\n    if (!wsTopic || !wsGrade) { alert(\"Vui lòng nhập đầy đủ chủ đề và lớp.\"); return; }\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const data = await generateWorksheet(wsTopic, wsGrade, wsTime, wsLevel, wsGoal, wsQuantity, wsHomeworkQuantity, wsContext);\n      setWorksheetProblems(data.problems);\n      setHomeworkProblems(data.homework || []);\n      setWsCoreKnowledge(data.coreKnowledge || []);\n      setReflectionQuestions(data.reflectionQuestions);\n      setStep('WORKSHEET_RESULT');\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error(err);\n      alert(err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Lỗi khi sinh phiếu học tập.\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleExportWorksheetJSON = () => {\n    const meta = { \n        topic: wsTopic, \n        grade: wsGrade, \n        time: wsTime, \n        coreKnowledge: wsCoreKnowledge, \n        problems: worksheetProblems, \n        homework: homeworkProblems, \n        reflectionQuestions \n    };\n    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(meta, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });\n    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n    const link = document.createElement('a');\n    link.href = url;\n    link.download = `Phieu_Hoc_Tap_${wsTopic.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}.json`;\n    link.click();\n    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n  };\n\n  const handleImportWorksheetJSON = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {\n    const file = e.target.files?.[0];\n    if (!file) return;\n    const reader = new FileReader();\n    reader.onload = (event) => {\n      try {\n        const wrap = JSON.parse(event.target?.result as string);\n        if (wrap.problems) {\n          setWsTopic(wrap.topic || \"\");\n          setWsGrade(wrap.grade || \"\");\n          setWsTime(wrap.time || 45);\n          setWsCoreKnowledge(wrap.coreKnowledge || []);\n          setReflectionQuestions(wrap.reflectionQuestions || []);\n          setWorksheetProblems(wrap.problems);\n          setHomeworkProblems(wrap.homework || []);\n          setStep('WORKSHEET_RESULT');\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        alert(\"Lỗi khi nhập file phiếu học tập.\");\n      }\n    };\n    reader.readAsText(file);\n    e.target.value = '';\n  };\n\n  const toggleAnalysisSelection = (idx: number) => {\n    const next = new Set(selectedAnalysisIdxs);\n    if (next.has(idx)) next.delete(idx); else next.add(idx);\n    setSelectedAnalysisIdxs(next);\n  };\n\n  const startGeneration = async () => {\n    const selectedProblems = analysisList.filter((_, i) => selectedAnalysisIdxs.has(i));\n    if (selectedProblems.length === 0) { alert(\"Vui lòng chọn ít nhất một câu để tiếp tục.\"); return; }\n    \n    setLoading(true); setStep('GENERATION');\n    try {\n      const problems = await generateExamSet(selectedProblems, config);\n      setGeneratedExam(problems);\n      setStep('RESULT');\n    } catch (err) { \n        console.error(err);\n        alert(err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Sinh đề thất bại.\"); \n        setStep('CONFIG'); \n    } finally { setLoading(false); }\n  };\n\n  const handleBankAction = (action: 'PRESENT' | 'WORD' | 'JSON') => {\n    const selected = bankItems.filter(item => selectedBankIds.has(item.id));\n    const problems: GeneratedProblem[] = selected.map((item, idx) => ({\n        id: item.id, title: `Bài ${idx + 1}`, content: item.originalContent, difficulty: item.difficulty, techniqueUsed: item.coreTechnique,\n        solution: item.suggestedSolution || \"N/A\", teacherNotes: item.coreIdea,\n        presentation: { questionSummary: item.originalContent, solutionSummary: item.suggestedSolution || \"N/A\", finalResult: \"N/A\" }\n    }));\n\n    if (action === 'PRESENT') { \n      setPresentationProblems(problems); \n      setPresentationMode(true); \n    } else if (action === 'WORD') {\n      exportToWord(problems, \"Ngân hàng\", 'NATIVE');\n    } else if (action === 'JSON') {\n      const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(problems, null, 2)], { type: 'application/json' });\n      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      const link = document.createElement('a');\n      link.href = url;\n      link.download = `Olympic_Exam_Set_${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}.json`;\n      link.click();\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handlePresentWorksheetExamples = () => {\n    const problems: GeneratedProblem[] = worksheetProblems.map(w => ({\n      id: w.id,\n      title: w.title,\n      content: w.example.content,\n      difficulty: 3,\n      techniqueUsed: \"Ví dụ mẫu\",\n      solution: w.example.solution,\n      teacherNotes: \"Ví dụ mẫu hướng dẫn\",\n      presentation: {\n        questionSummary: w.example.content,\n        solutionSummary: w.example.solution,\n        finalResult: w.example.answer\n      }\n    }));\n    \n    // Thêm slide kiến thức trọng tâm vào đầu danh sách trình chiếu\n    if (wsCoreKnowledge.length > 0) {\n      const coreKnowledgeProblem: GeneratedProblem = {\n        id: 'core-knowledge',\n        title: wsTopic || 'KIẾN THỨC TRỌNG TÂM', // Use worksheet topic for prominent title\n        content: JSON.stringify(wsCoreKnowledge), // Gửi dạng JSON để PresentationView xử lý animation\n        difficulty: 5,\n        techniqueUsed: 'CORE_KNOWLEDGE',\n        solution: '',\n        teacherNotes: '',\n        presentation: {\n          questionSummary: wsTopic || 'Nội dung kiến thức trọng tâm cần nhớ',\n          solutionSummary: '',\n          finalResult: ''\n        }\n      };\n      problems.unshift(coreKnowledgeProblem);\n    }\n\n    setPresentationProblems(problems);\n    setPresentationMode(true);\n  };\n\n  const handleSaveAllToBank = () => {\n      const items = generatedExam.map(p => ({\n          originalContent: p.content, topic: p.techniqueUsed, grade: analysisList[0]?.grade || \"HSG\", coreTechnique: p.techniqueUsed,\n          difficulty: p.difficulty, coreIdea: p.teacherNotes, suggestedSolution: p.solution, potentialVariations: []\n      }));\n      saveToBank(items);\n      alert(\"Đã lưu vào ngân hàng.\");\n  };\n\n  // --- EDITING HANDLERS ---\n\n  const startEdit = (type: 'ANALYSIS' | 'RESULT', index: number) => {\n    setEditingItem({ type, index });\n    setActiveEditField('content'); // Default focus\n    setShowMathKeyboard(true);\n    if (type === 'ANALYSIS') {\n      const item = analysisList[index];\n      setEditForm({ \n        title: `Bài Gốc ${index + 1}`,\n        content: item.originalContent, \n        solution: item.suggestedSolution || '' \n      });\n    } else {\n      const item = generatedExam[index];\n      setEditForm({\n        title: item.title,\n        content: item.content,\n        solution: item.solution\n      });\n    }\n  };\n\n  const saveEdit = () => {\n    if (!editingItem) return;\n\n    if (editingItem.type === 'ANALYSIS') {\n      const newList = [...analysisList];\n      newList[editingItem.index] = {\n        ...newList[editingItem.index],\n        originalContent: editForm.content,\n        suggestedSolution: editForm.solution\n      };\n      setAnalysisList(newList);\n    } else {\n      const newList = [...generatedExam];\n      newList[editingItem.index] = {\n        ...newList[editingItem.index],\n        title: editForm.title || newList[editingItem.index].title,\n        content: editForm.content,\n        solution: editForm.solution,\n        presentation: {\n          ...newList[editingItem.index].presentation,\n          questionSummary: editForm.content,\n          solutionSummary: editForm.solution\n        }\n      };\n      setGeneratedExam(newList);\n    }\n    setEditingItem(null);\n    setShowMathKeyboard(false);\n  };\n\n  const cancelEdit = () => {\n    setEditingItem(null);\n    setShowMathKeyboard(false);\n  };\n\n  const handleInsertLatex = (latex: string) => {\n    const el = activeTextareaRef.current;\n    if (!el) return;\n\n    const start = el.selectionStart || 0;\n    const end = el.selectionEnd || 0;\n    const currentVal = el.value;\n    \n    // Insert text\n    const newVal = currentVal.substring(0, start) + latex + currentVal.substring(end);\n    \n    // Update state based on active field\n    setEditForm(prev => ({\n        ...prev,\n        [activeEditField]: newVal\n    }));\n\n    // Restore focus and cursor (delayed to allow render)\n    setTimeout(() => {\n        el.focus();\n        el.setSelectionRange(start + latex.length, start + latex.length);\n    }, 0);\n  };\n\n  // Helper to handle focus to track which field is active\n  const handleFieldFocus = (field: 'content' | 'solution' | 'title', e: React.FocusEvent<HTMLTextAreaElement | HTMLInputElement>) => {\n    setActiveEditField(field);\n    activeTextareaRef.current = e.target;\n  };\n\n  // Callback to update a single problem from PresentationView\n  const handleUpdateProblem = (updatedProblem: GeneratedProblem) => {\n    // Update in generatedExam if it exists there\n    setGeneratedExam(prev => prev.map(p => p.id === updatedProblem.id ? updatedProblem : p));\n    // Update in presentationProblems (which might be a subset or different set)\n    setPresentationProblems(prev => prev.map(p => p.id === updatedProblem.id ? updatedProblem : p));\n  };\n\n  // Helper to ensure math is rendered correctly even if AI forgets delimiters\n  const formatMath = (text: string) => {\n      if (!text) return \"\";\n      // If it looks like LaTeX (contains backslash) but doesn't have $, wrap it\n      if (text.includes('\\\\') && !text.includes('$')) {\n          return `$${text}$`;\n      }\n      return text;\n  };\n\n  // Render Intro Overlay if showIntro is true\n  if (showIntro) {\n    return <IntroAnimation />;\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 pb-20 selection:bg-indigo-100 selection:text-indigo-900 font-['Roboto']\">\n      \n      {/* HEADER - Auto Hiding */}\n      <div className={`fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 transition-transform duration-300 ${isHeaderVisible ? 'translate-y-0' : '-translate-y-full'}`}>\n        <header className=\"bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md shadow-sm px-8 h-18 flex items-center justify-between border-b border-slate-100\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer group\" onClick={() => setView('WORKFLOW')}>\n            <div className=\"bg-indigo-600 text-white p-2.5 rounded-xl group-hover:rotate-6 transition-transform\"><Brain size={24} /></div>\n            <div>\n              <h1 className=\"text-xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-800\">Soạn Giảng 4.0</h1>\n              <p className=\"text-[9px] font-black text-indigo-500 uppercase tracking-widest\">AI Professional Math Assistant</p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-4\">\n             <div className=\"bg-slate-100 p-1 rounded-2xl flex gap-1 border border-slate-200\">\n              <button onClick={() => { setView('WORKFLOW'); setStep('INPUT'); }} className={`px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-black text-xs uppercase tracking-widest transition-all ${view === 'WORKFLOW' ? 'bg-white text-indigo-700 shadow-md' : 'text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-800'}`}>Studio</button>\n              <button onClick={() => { setView('WORKSHEET'); setStep('WORKSHEET_INPUT'); }} className={`px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-black text-xs uppercase tracking-widest transition-all ${view === 'WORKSHEET' ? 'bg-white text-indigo-700 shadow-md' : 'text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-800'}`}>Phiếu Học Tập</button>\n              <button onClick={() => setView('BANK')} className={`px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl font-black text-xs uppercase tracking-widest transition-all ${view === 'BANK' ? 'bg-white text-indigo-700 shadow-md' : 'text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-800'}`}>Ngân Hàng</button>\n            </div>\n            <button \n                onClick={() => setShowApiModal(true)} \n                className=\"p-3 rounded-full bg-slate-100 hover:bg-indigo-100 text-slate-500 hover:text-indigo-600 transition-colors\"\n                title=\"Cài đặt API Key\"\n            >\n                <Settings size={20} />\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </header>\n      </div>\n\n      <main className=\"max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 py-24\">\n        {view === 'WORKFLOW' ? (\n          <>\n            {/* FOOTER PROGRESS BAR - Auto Hiding */}\n            <div className={`fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-40 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-slate-200 shadow-[0_-5px_15px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] transition-transform duration-300 ${isFooterVisible ? 'translate-y-0' : 'translate-y-full'}`}>\n                 <ProgressBar currentStep={step as any} />\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"mb-20\">\n              {step === 'INPUT' && (\n                <div className=\"max-w-4xl mx-auto space-y-8 animate-fadeIn\">\n                  <div className=\"bg-white p-12 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-xl shadow-slate-200/50 border border-slate-100\">\n                    <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-10\">\n                      <h2 className=\"text-3xl font-black text-slate-800 flex items-center gap-4\">\n                          <div className=\"w-12 h-12 bg-indigo-50 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-indigo-600\"><FileText size={24}/></div>\n                          Tải Lên Đề Gốc\n                      </h2>\n                      <button \n                        onClick={() => presentationFileRef.current?.click()}\n                        className=\"flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 rounded-xl text-xs font-black hover:bg-indigo-600 hover:text-white transition-all border border-slate-200\"\n                      >\n                        <FileJson size={16}/> TRÌNH CHIẾU TỪ FILE JSON\n                      </button>\n                      <input type=\"file\" ref={presentationFileRef} className=\"hidden\" accept=\".json\" onChange={handlePresentationFileLoad} />\n                    </div>\n                    <div className=\"mb-10\">\n                      <textarea className=\"w-full h-56 p-8 bg-slate-50/50 border-2 border-slate-100 rounded-3xl font-serif text-xl focus:ring-8 focus:ring-indigo-500/5 focus:border-indigo-500 outline-none transition-all\" placeholder=\"Nhập đề bài tại đây...\" value={problemText} onChange={(e) => setProblemText(e.target.value)} />\n                    </div>\n                    {!inputFile ? (\n                      <div onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()} className=\"group border-2 border-dashed border-slate-200 rounded-[2rem] p-16 text-center cursor-pointer hover:border-indigo-400 hover:bg-indigo-50/20 transition-all\">\n                        <input type=\"file\" ref={fileInputRef} className=\"hidden\" accept=\".pdf,.docx,image/*\" onChange={handleFileChange} />\n                        <p className=\"text-slate-600 font-bold text-lg mb-2\">PDF, Word hoặc Ảnh chụp đề bài</p>\n                      </div>\n                    ) : (\n                      <div className=\"bg-indigo-600 p-8 rounded-[2rem] flex items-center justify-between text-white shadow-2xl\">\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-6\">\n                            <FileIcon size={28}/>\n                            <p className=\"font-black text-lg\">{inputFile.name}</p>\n                        </div>\n                        <button onClick={() => setInputFile(null)}><X size={20}/></button>\n                      </div>\n                    )}\n                    <button onClick={startAnalysis} disabled={loading} className=\"w-full mt-12 bg-indigo-600 text-white py-6 rounded-3xl font-black text-xl uppercase tracking-widest flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-all disabled:opacity-50\">\n                      {loading ? <RefreshCcw className=\"animate-spin mr-3\"/> : <Brain className=\"mr-3\" />} Bắt Đầu Phân Tích\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              )}\n\n              {step === 'ANALYSIS' && (\n                <div className=\"max-w-5xl mx-auto space-y-8 animate-fadeIn\">\n                  <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center bg-white p-8 rounded-[2rem] border border-slate-100 shadow-xl\">\n                    <h2 className=\"text-3xl font-black flex items-center gap-4 text-slate-800\">\n                      <div className=\"w-12 h-12 bg-indigo-50 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center text-indigo-600\"><Layers size={24}/></div>\n                      Kết Quả Phân Tích Đề Gốc\n                    </h2>\n                    <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-3\">\n                      <button \n                        onClick={() => { setPresentationProblems(mapSelectedAnalysis()); setPresentationMode(true); }} \n                        disabled={selectedAnalysisIdxs.size === 0}\n                        className=\"px-6 py-3 bg-indigo-600 text-white rounded-xl font-black flex items-center gap-2 text-xs shadow-lg disabled:opacity-50 hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-all\"\n                      >\n                        <Presentation size={18}/> TRÌNH CHIẾU\n                      </button>\n                      <button \n                        onClick={() => exportToWord(mapSelectedAnalysis(), \"De_Goc\", 'NATIVE')} \n                        disabled={selectedAnalysisIdxs.size === 0}\n                        className=\"px-6 py-3 bg-emerald-600 text-white rounded-xl font-black flex items-center gap-2 text-xs shadow-lg disabled:opacity-50 hover:bg-emerald-700 transition-all\"\n                      >\n                        <Download size={18}/> XUẤT WORD\n                      </button>\n                      <button \n                        onClick={() => handleExportResultsJSON(mapSelectedAnalysis(), \"De_Goc\")} \n                        disabled={selectedAnalysisIdxs.size === 0}\n                        className=\"px-6 py-3 bg-slate-800 text-white rounded-xl font-black flex items-center gap-2 text-xs shadow-lg disabled:opacity-50 hover:bg-slate-900 transition-all\"\n                      >\n                        <FileDown size={18}/> JSON\n                      </button>\n                    </div>\n                  </div>\n\n                  <div className=\"bg-white p-10 rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-xl border border-slate-100\">\n                    <div className=\"flex justify-between items-center mb-8\">\n                        <p className=\"text-sm font-black text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest\">Hãy chọn câu bạn muốn sinh biến thể hoặc trình chiếu</p>\n                        <div className=\"flex gap-4\">\n                            <button onClick={() => setSelectedAnalysisIdxs(new Set(analysisList.map((_, i) => i)))} className=\"text-xs font-black text-indigo-600 uppercase tracking-widest underline\">Chọn tất cả</button>\n                            <button onClick={() => setSelectedAnalysisIdxs(new Set())} className=\"text-xs font-black text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-widest underline\">Bỏ chọn</button>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    <div className=\"space-y-6\">\n                      {analysisList.map((item, idx) => {\n                        return (\n                          <div key={idx} \n                              onClick={() => toggleAnalysisSelection(idx)}\n                              className={`p-8 border-2 rounded-3xl transition-all cursor-pointer group i < len; i++) {\n    bytes[i] = binaryString.charCodeAt(i);\n  }\n  return bytes;\n}\n\nasync function decodeAudioData(\n  data: Uint8Array,\n  ctx: AudioContext,\n  sampleRate: number,\n  numChannels: number,\n): Promise<AudioBuffer> {\n  const dataInt16 = new Int16Array(data.buffer);\n  const frameCount = dataInt16.length / numChannels;\n  const buffer = ctx.createBuffer(numChannels, frameCount, sampleRate);\n\n  for (let channel = 0; channel < numChannels; channel++) {\n    const channelData = buffer.getChannelData(channel);\n    for (let i = 0; i < frameCount; i++) {\n      channelData[i] = dataInt16[i * numChannels + channel] / 32768.0;\n    }\n  }\n  return buffer;\n}\n\n// Utility for exponential backoff retry\nconst fetchWithRetry = async <T,>(fn: () => Promise<T>, retries = 3, delay = 2000): Promise<T> => {\n  for (let i = 0; i < retries; i++) {\n    try {\n      return await fn();\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      const isRateLimit = err?.message?.includes('429') || err?.status === 429;\n      if (isRateLimit && i < retries - 1) {\n        const waitTime = delay * Math.pow(2, i);\n        console.warn(`Rate limit hit. Retrying in ${waitTime}ms... (Attempt ${i + 1}/${retries})`);\n        await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, waitTime));\n        continue;\n      }\n      throw err;\n    }\n  }\n  throw new Error(\"Retry failed\");\n};\n\nexport const PresentationView: React.FC<PresentationViewProps> = ({ \n  problems, initialIndex, onClose, initialBackgrounds = [], onUpdateBackgrounds, onUpdateProblem\n}) => {\n Vui lòng thử lại sau giây lát.\" \n        : \"Không thể phát giọng đọc lúc này.\";\n      setTtsError(msg);\n      setTimeout(() => setTtsError(null), 5000);\n    } finally {\n      setIsLoadingTTS(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const playBuffer = (buffer: AudioBuffer) => {\n    if (!audioContextRef.current) return;\n    stopSpeech(); \n\n    const source = audioContextRef.current.createBufferSource();\n    source.buffer = buffer;\n    source.connect(audioContextRef.current.destination);\n    source.onended = () => setIsReading(false);\n    \n    audioSourceRef.current = source;\n    setIsReading(true);\n    source.start();\n  };\n\n  const handleToggleResult = () => {\n    const nextShowResult = !showResult;\n    setShowResult(nextShowResult);\n    if (nextShowResult) {\n      setTimeLeft(null);\n      setIsTimerActive(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (isTimerActive && timeLeft !== null && setIsTimerActive(false);\n      if (timerRef.current) clearInterval(timerRef.current);\n    }\n    return () => { if (timerRef.current) clearInterval(timerRef.current); };\n  }, [isTimerActive, timeLeft]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const handleFsChange = () => setIsAppFullScreen(!!document.fullscreenElement);\n    document.addEventListener('fullscreenchange', handleFsChange);\n    return
